name: Changshu Guorui Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Changshu Guorui Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells marine and offshore engineering electrical/automation equipment. The company offers MV switchboards, marine circuit-breakers, LV controls and switchboards, ship monitoring, power electronicsts, ship handlings, and lighting monitoring. It also provides marine electricity systems and integrated technical services. The company was formerly known as Changshu Ruite Electric Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Changshu Guorui Technology Co., Ltd. in October 2020. Changshu Guorui Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Changshu, China.
